Udemy recognized as Strategic Leader in 2025 Fosway 9-Grid™ for Digital Learning. Nasdaq: UDMY. Excellence in offering comprehensive solutions.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a prominent online skills marketplace, was recently recognized as a Strategic Leader in the 2025 Fosway 9-Grid™ for Digital Learning. This model evaluates the learning market from various angles. Fosway highlighted that Strategic Leaders, like Udemy, stand out for providing advanced solutions tailored to intricate enterprise requirements, thereby achieving great product-market alignment and customer advocacy. This acknowledgment underscores Udemy's notable achievements in the field.

news.headline: Major law firms file lawsuit against Trump's executive orders criticizing them, citing they weaponized legal system. Jenner & Block and WilmerHale respond in court.
news.summary: The legal system has become a battleground as President Trump accuses prominent law firms of manipulating it. On Friday, Jenner & Block and WilmerHale countered the allegations in court.

news.headline: Inventor creates Wadu Tub for Muslims in California, aiming to enhance safety and religious significance during wudu.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, a resident of Aliso Viejo, California, shared plans to introduce a new tub for wudu preparation and purification, aimed at enhancing safety and religious value for Muslims. The inventor expressed the vision behind the creation of the WADU TUB, emphasizing its innovative design tailored for Muslim rituals.

news.headline: Global AI Gateway market projected to reach $9843 million by 2031, led by cloud and on-premise deployments across various sectors.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of March 28, 2025, the global AI Gateway market is categorized by type into cloud-based and on-premises, and by application into enterprise AI deployment, healthcare data integration, and fraud detection. In 2024, the market was valued at USD 3911 million.

Bitcoin's price dropped below $85,000, but traders remain bullish, with the possibility of the bull market extending.
news.summary: Market analysts are optimistic about Bitcoin's continued growth, with traders seeing potential for the cryptocurrency to surpass its current value of $83,000. Astrologer, a prominent trader, highlighted historical trends suggesting further increases in Bitcoin's value. While some traders are cautious due to concerns of a possible decline at the end of the week, the overall sentiment on long-term trends is positive. Bitcoin is currently trading above crucial support levels and traders expect the bullish momentum to continue. For more information, refer to the complete article on a financial news website.

news.headline: North America's online language learning market to hit $9.8 billion by 2031, with a 19.3% CAGR from 2024, driven by AI, pricing, and workforce demands.
news.summary: Market growth in REDDING, California, as of March 28, 2025, is fueled by the seamless integration of AI technology, adoption of versatile pricing structures, and a surge in the need for multilingual employees. The latest market analysis report on the North America Online Language Learning sector indicates promising metrics regarding market size, share, and future projections.

news.headline: Michael Baker International hires 3 new staff: IDA Market Director & VP for Southwestern & Northwestern U.S., Business Development Executive & VP for Private Sector Clients.
news.summary: A company has introduced Edward (Ed) Hanbicki, AIA, NCARB, LEED BD&C, as the Market Director and Vice President for the Southwestern and Northwestern regions of the United States. Additionally, Ford Hubbard has been appointed as the Business Development Executive and Vice President for Private Sector Clients, specifically concentrating on Texas and the Southeastern U.S. Keep reading to know more about the new hires and their roles within the company.

news.headline: Cathie Wood stands firm on $2,600 Tesla stock prediction, expecting 10x surge by 2030 despite 32% YTD decline in 2025.
news.summary: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest, has maintained her optimistic price target of $2,600 for Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) despite the stock's 32% decrease in value so far in 2025. Wood anticipates a significant 10-fold increase in Tesla's stock price, projecting it to reach $2,600 per share by 2030. This outlook was expressed during an interview with Bloomberg TV on Monday. Wood cited the contributing factor to this surge as Tesla's robotaxi segment, which she believes will make up 90% of the company's market share. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a 300-point decline due to a Fed inflation gauge that surpassed expectations. Anaergia to supply anaerobic digestion system to City of Fermo, Italy with joint venture partner Edil Alta.
news.summary: Anaergia Inc., along with its subsidiary Anaergia S.r.l., and joint venture partner Edil Alta S.r.l, has been granted approval by the City of Fermo, Italy, to commence construction of a waste treatment plant. The project will include a new anaerobic digestion facility and is a collaboration with a leading Italian construction company. Once completed, the facility will be able to handle a larger quantity of waste for treatment. Anaergia's stock is listed on the TSX under the symbol ANRG and on the OTCQX as ANRGF.

Bitcoin dips 3% on US PCE data, must hold $84K says analyst. BTC price hits lows under $84.5K before reversing. Inflation quickens, anticipates possible stagflation by 2025. Experts warn of market cooldown and potential drop to $78-80K before bounce back. Trend remains bullish but concerns arise.
news.summary: Bitcoin faced volatility on March 28, dropping over 3% to lows under $84,500, the lowest since March 23. The US Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) Index showed increased inflation with a 0.3% month-on-month and 2.5% year-on-year rise. BTC price analysis indicated a "typical market cooldown" despite the inflation warning, with traders cautious about the market's strength. Some believed BTC could see a test at $78-80K before bouncing back up, with doubts lingering about a sustained bull run. The broader outlook indicated a potential seasonal reset, aligning with a familiar market dynamic of "sell in May and go away." BTC's short-term price action suggested localized pressure, but a full bullish comeback seemed unlikely on short timeframes. Bitcoin held above $80,000 for weeks but remained in a shaky position.

news.headline: Ascent Solar delivers space-worthy PV blankets to European space provider in record 2 weeks. Launch set for later in 2025.
news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado, on March 28, 2025, Ascent Solar Technologies (Nasdaq: ASTI), a key figure in the U.S. in featherweight, flexible thin-film photovoltaic solutions, revealed the supplying of spaceflight-ready PV blankets to a major European space systems provider. These cutting-edge blankets aim to enhance spacecraft efficiency by reducing weight and boosting power. They are slated for a space mission later in 2025.

It is further divided by application into Computer Games and Mobile Games. The worldwide market for Game Engines reached a value of USD 1257 million in the year 2024.

news.headline: Polymer Additive Manufacturing market to hit $36.19B by 2031, with 15.1% CAGR growth from 2024, driven by demand for lightweight materials and 3D printing technologies.
news.summary: The growth of the market is fueled by increasing interest in lightweight materials and advancements in 3D printing technologies. In Redding, California, as of March 28, 2025, a recent report titled 'Polymer Additive Manufacturing Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis' highlights this trend. The report explores the expanding market, indicating a strong demand for these materials. It reveals significant numbers in market size, share, and forecasts, underscoring the impact of technological progress on the industry.

news.headline: MarTech market to surge to $296.88B by 2030 from $175.95B in 2025, with 11.0% CAGR - MarketsandMarkets report.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects significant growth in the MarTech Market, foreseeing an increase from USD 175.95 billion in 2025 to USD 296.88 billion by 2030. This expansion represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.0% during the forecast period of 2025–2030. The report offers a detailed look at the market with 300 tables included in the in-depth table of contents for the "MarTech Market."

news.headline: Inventor from Paterson, N.J. develops R K P DEVICE to separate refrigerator from freezer for easier movement.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, an inventor from Paterson, New Jersey, shared the inspiration behind creating the R K P DEVICE, aimed at separating a refrigerator from a freezer for ease of carrying and moving. The inventor explained the need for better maneuverability for the two units and expressed how the new design would facilitate transporting the appliance.
